title: Jr. Backend Developer
description: Biz Kimiz? Günlük yaşamınızı iyileştirmek için akıllı ve yenilikçi çözümler üretmeye kendini adamış bir markayız. “Şımart Teknoloji” olarak sizlere, hayatınızı daha rahat, daha konforlu ve daha güvenli hale getirmek için tasarlanmış geniş bir ürün yelpazesi sunuyoruz. İşini severek yapan ve alanında uzman kişilerden oluşan ekibimiz ile en iyi ürünleri sunmak için sürekli son teknolojiyi araştırıyoruz ve geliştiriyoruz. Hızla büyüyen ve gelişen ekibimize, “Jr. Backend Developer” arayışımız bulunmaktadır. İş Tanımı ·        Backend servislerinin geliştirilmesi ve mevcut projelerin bakımına destek vermek, ·        API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerine katılmak, ·        Temiz, okunabilir ve sürdürülebilir kod yazmak, ·        Veri tabanı tasarımı ve optimizasyon süreçlerinde görev almak, ·        Yeni teknolojileri takip ederek uygulamalara katkıda bulunmak, ·        Yapay zekayı aktif olarak kullanarak sistemlere dahil etmek. Genel Nitelikler ·        Benzer pozisyonda 1 yıl deneyim sahibi oldum, ·        İyi derecede PHP ve MYSQL bilgim var, ·        Kurumsal şirket ortamını görme ya da çalışma imkanına sahip oldum, ·        Javascript, jQuery, HTML, CSS bilgine sahibim, ·        Etimesgut/Sincan bölgesinde ikamet ediyorum ya da ulaşım konusunda sıkıntı yaşamam diyorsan, başvurunu heyecanla bekliyoruz. Sunduğumuz İmkanlar ·        Genç ve dinamik bir ekip ile çalışma fırsatı, ·        Öğrenme ve gelişim odaklı bir çalışma ortamı, ·        Doğum günü izni, ·        Kaizen sistemi, ·        Aylık performans değerlendirme sistemi ve prim ödülleri. *Çalışma düzenimiz ofistendir.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer (.NET & Azure)
description: About Us Nartio is a London-based, fast-growing assessment company dedicated to helping organisations identify and develop talent scientifically and objectively. We provide innovative, data-driven solutions that support better people decisions. To learn more about us, visit www.nartio.com. Position Overview We are looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer to join our Istanbul team and take ownership of product development for Nartio’s scalable SaaS platform. This role sits at the intersection of software engineering, cloud architecture, product development, and AI-powered HR technology. You will play a key role in designing, building, and improving secure, high-performance web applications, APIs, and cloud-based services that support enterprise customers globally. What You’ll Do • Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications and APIs. • Build new product features from concept to production. • Develop secure and high-performance backend services using .NET. • Create modern, responsive user interfaces. • Design and optimise database structures. • Integrate third-party systems and external APIs. • Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure on Microsoft Azure. • Participate in architecture, code reviews, and technical planning. • Improve platform performance, reliability, and security. • Work closely with Product, Design, and Customer Success teams. What We’re Looking For • 5+ years of professional software development experience. • Strong expertise in C# and .NET Core / .NET 8+. • Experience with ASP.NET Core Web API development and RESTful APIs. • Strong experience with React, TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3. • Experience with Entity Framework Core, LINQ, and Microsoft SQL Server. • Experience with authentication and authorisation, including JWT, OAuth2, and OpenID Connect. • Experience with background processing, queues, and asynchronous workloads. • Strong understanding of performance, scalability, secure coding, and clean architecture. • Practical experience with Microsoft Azure for SaaS applications. • Experience with Azure App Service, Azure Functions, Azure SQL, and Azure Storage. • Knowledge of cloud monitoring, logging, and reliability practices. • Experience with CI/CD using Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions. • Experience with Git-based workflows, automated testing, and Agile / Scrum methodologies. Nice to Have • Experience building B2B SaaS platforms. • Experience with multi-tenant application architecture. • Experience with AI and LLM integrations. • Knowledge of Azure OpenAI, vector databases, and semantic search. • Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, or Infrastructure as Code. • Experience working in HR technology, recruitment, assessment, talent management, learning and development, or analytics platforms. • Experience working in fast-moving startup environments. Nartio is an equal-opportunity employer. We encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply.

title: Full Stack Software Engineering Intern
description: About Lufios Lufios is building AI for operational case tracking. We connect to the ERP, BI, SQL, Excel, and KPI reports companies already use, detect operational anomalies, investigate possible root causes with AI, and ask the right person what happened through channels like WhatsApp, Slack, Teams, and email. Dashboards show what broke. Lufios goes after why it broke, turns the answer into a tracked follow up, and builds a searchable operational memory over time. The product is live, demand is real, and the roadmap is moving faster than a two founder team can build alone. That is why we are looking for a Full Stack Software Engineering Intern to join us this summer. The Role You will work directly with the CEO and CTO on the live Lufios product. No fake intern projects. No layers. No corporate theater. Just you, the founders, real customers, and product work that actually ships. What You Will Do Build full stack features across frontend and backend Work on customer facing product flows Help improve integrations with WhatsApp, Slack, Teams, email, ERP and BI systems, SQL databases, and Excel based data sources Use AI assisted coding tools like Codex and Claude Code Debug, iterate, and ship fast Turn customer feedback into product improvements What We Are Looking For 2nd, 3rd, or 4th year university student Able to work full time over the summer Comfortable building software with JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, or a similar modern language Strong SQL skills and comfortable working with complex queries, joins, aggregations, and operational data Strong mathematical and statistical reasoning, with the ability to turn messy business data into clear logic and useful insights Basic understanding of frontend, backend, APIs, databases, and web apps Comfortable with AI assisted coding and fast iteration Curious about AI, B2B SaaS, startups, and how real businesses operate Hungry to learn, ship, and take ownership Compensation Paid internship plus direct mentorship from the founders. Stock option opportunities in ground.

title: Staff Backend Engineer (Financial Ledger)
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Staff Backend Engineer (Financial Ledger) based in Turkey. This role sits at the core of a rapidly evolving financial infrastructure powering a modern travel-tech SaaS platform. You will take ownership of a critical backend system responsible for financial accuracy, including revenue recognition, payments, ledger events, and profit calculation across a distributed environment. Rather than building from scratch, you will join an active evolution phase where foundational architecture already exists and is being expanded toward a more scalable and robust V2. The position requires deep technical leadership combined with hands-on engineering, ensuring the correctness and reliability of financial flows that directly impact business operations. You will collaborate closely with engineering and finance stakeholders to define invariants, validate system behavior, and guide architectural decisions. This is a high-impact role where your work becomes the backbone of financial truth for a growing SaaS ecosystem. Accountabilities Take technical ownership of the Financial Core system, guiding its evolution, challenging assumptions, and aligning architecture with long-term financial scalability. Ensure system integrity by validating lifecycle flows, reconciliation logic, and financial correctness across distributed services. Design and maintain ledger-style financial models, including revenue recognition, cost allocation, and multi-party transaction flows. Improve and enforce strict financial invariants within an event-driven architecture to ensure deterministic and auditable outcomes. Collaborate with finance and engineering leadership to translate business rules into robust technical implementations. Lead the evolution of a live production system, identifying gaps in current architecture and driving improvements toward future iterations. Support system reliability and scalability across payment, billing, and financial reporting domains. Contribute hands-on to backend development while shaping long-term architectural direction. Requirements 8+ years of backend engineering experience with strong ownership of financial, billing, or transactional systems. Proven experience building or maintaining financial platforms such as payment systems, billing engines, ERP solutions, or subscription infrastructure. Deep expertise in ledger systems, reconciliation mechanisms, and ensuring deterministic financial correctness. Strong understanding of financial concepts such as revenue recognition, liabilities, cost structures, and multi-party money flows. Experience evolving complex production systems in active environments without disrupting existing functionality. Hands-on engineering mindset with the ability to both design architecture and implement critical backend systems. Strong proficiency with Python and relational data modeling (PostgreSQL preferred). Experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems in cloud environments (AWS preferred). Ability to handle complex financial scenarios including multi-currency, taxation logic, and settlement flows. Benefits Competitive compensation aligned with senior-level backend engineering roles Fully remote-friendly work environment Opportunity to own a mission-critical financial system at the core of a SaaS transformation High-impact technical leadership role with significant architectural autonomy Exposure to complex financial systems and large-scale distributed architectures Collaborative environment working closely with engineering and finance stakeholders Modern cloud-based stack (AWS, event-driven systems, Python-based services) Long-term technical ownership of a foundational business system How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Java Backend Developer
description: We're Hiring: Java Developer Location: Hybrid – [Istanbul-Ankara] or Remote Employment Type: Full-Time Level: Mid-Level (3+ years experience) About the Role: We are looking for a Java Developer to join our dynamic and fast-growing software team. You will play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining highly available and resilient applications. If you have a solid technical background, a passion for learning, and a team-oriented mindset, we’d love to meet you! Key Qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field (preferred) Minimum 3 years of professional Java development experience Hands-on experience with Spring Boot, Spring MVC, and Spring Data JPA/JDBS, Hibernate Strong knowledge of Redis and Kafka Solid experience with relational databases such as MySQL or PostgreSQL Experience with MongoDB is required Proficient in multithreading and asynchronous programming Familiarity with web services such as REST and SOAP Comfortable working within Agile/Scrum methodologies Willingness to be involved in all stages of the software development lifecycle (analysis, development, testing, debugging, etc.) Eagerness to learn new technologies and continuously improve Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset Actively using AI-powered development tools (e.g., Claude Code, ChatGPT Codex, etc.) to improve productivity and code quality What We Offer: Opportunity to work with modern technologies A supportive and dynamic team environment Room for personal and professional growth Projects that address real-world challenges How to Apply: If this role sounds like a good fit for you, please send your updated resume and any relevant project links (e.g., GitHub) to [hr@melasoft.com]

title: Full Stack Developer (PHP Laravel & React)
company: Adorel Lojistik Kargo Telekomünikasyon Yazılım İç ve Dış Ticaret A.Ş
description: Biz Kimiz? Adorel Teknoloji olarak kargo, lojistik ve e-ticaret sektörlerine yönelik yenilikçi yazılım çözümleri geliştiriyoruz. Kargo takip sistemleri, lojistik yönetim platformları, entegrasyon altyapıları ve operasyon yönetim yazılımları üzerinde çalışıyor; modern teknolojiler kullanarak ölçeklenebilir ürünler geliştiriyoruz. Ekibimize katılacak, backend tarafında Laravel, frontend tarafında React teknolojileri ile çalışacak, gelişime açık ve sorumluluk sahibi bir Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Aranan NiteliklerBackend PHP ve Laravel Framework ile en az 1 yıl geliştirme deneyimi REST API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerine hakim olmak MVC mimarisi hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak PostgreSQL veya benzeri ilişkisel veritabanları ile çalışma deneyimi Authentication, Authorization, Validation gibi temel güvenlik prensiplerine hakim olmak Frontend React ile proje geliştirmiş olmak JavaScript (ES6+) bilgisine sahip olmak HTML5, CSS3 ve Responsive Design konusunda deneyimli olmak API entegrasyonları konusunda tecrübeli olmak State Management yapıları hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak Genel Yetkinlikler Git kullanımına hakim olmak Docker konusunda temel veya orta seviyede bilgi sahibi olmak Takım çalışmasına yatkın olmak Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme becerisine sahip olmak Temiz, sürdürülebilir ve okunabilir kod yazmaya önem vermek Yeni teknolojileri öğrenmeye ve kendini geliştirmeye istekli olmak Tercihen TypeScript bilgisi React Query, Redux veya Zustand deneyimi Docker Container yönetimi bilgisi Linux sunucu ortamlarında çalışma deneyimi Nginx bilgisi CI/CD süreçleri hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak AWS, DigitalOcean veya benzeri cloud servisleri ile çalışma deneyimi Redis, Queue ve Cache mekanizmaları hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak Görev ve Sorumluluklar Laravel tabanlı backend servislerinin geliştirilmesi ve bakımının yapılması React tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzlerinin geliştirilmesi Mevcut projelere yeni özelliklerin eklenmesi Üçüncü parti servis ve API entegrasyonlarının geliştirilmesi Hata analizi, performans iyileştirmeleri ve optimizasyon çalışmalarının yapılması Kod inceleme süreçlerine katılım sağlamak ve ekip içi teknik gelişime katkıda bulunmak Yazılım dokümantasyonlarının hazırlanmasına destek olmak Neler Sunuyoruz? Gerçek kullanıcıya ulaşan büyük ölçekli projelerde çalışma fırsatı Laravel, React, Docker ve modern yazılım teknolojileri ile çalışma imkanı Kariyer gelişimini destekleyen çalışma ortamı Dinamik ve genç ekip Uzun vadeli çalışma fırsatı Lokasyon: Ankara (Ofis Çalışması) Pozisyon: Junior / Mid-Level Full Stack Developer Çalışma Şekli: Tam Zamanlı

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: A Bit About Us... Please allow us to celebrate our own success for a moment... We've built a customer-centric product that is market-leading, and we are smashing it! We're a multi-award-winning digital payments and insight platform within the automotive industry. We work with over 5,000 automotive retailers, helping drivers to pay for motoring costs, accessories, and other services through a variety of different payment options. Our purpose is to build a solution that gives drivers peace of mind while enhancing customer experience and assisting with dealer profitability. Bumper is a fast-growing payments scale-up and we’re excited to continue building on our growth having completed a successful Series B funding round in 2024. We’re looking to hire a dynamic and passionate Senior Backend Engineer , based in Ankara . Our Head Office is in Sheffield City Centre, with offices also based in London and Turkey. We've also expanded further, bringing retailers in Ireland, Germany, Spain, and the Netherlands on board, with the vision of being the leading automotive payment and insights platform! As a Senior Backend Engineer, you will report directly to the Team Lead and play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining our backend systems to ensure the functionality and scalability of our platform. Responsibilities Collaborating closely with teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions, Design, develop, and implement high-quality, scalable, and maintainable backend systems and APIs, Conducting code reviews to ensure code quality, performance, and adherence to best practices, Providing timely solutions to troubleshoot complex technical issues, debug them, and minimize their impact on the platform, Being able to divide work into small outputs and actively delegate work to more than one team member, Mentoring young engineers by encouraging a culture of continuous learning and growth within the team, Staying abreast of emerging technologies and industry trends by proposing and implementing innovative solutions to enhance the capabilities of our platform. Qualifications Having at least 5 years advanced knowledge of Django, Having at least 5 years advanced knowledge of Python, At least five years of experience working with SQL databases, Expert in software design principles and experience in REST APIs, Practice using Git and the ability to overcome technical problems encountered in Git, etc., Expert level knowledge of a functional area of Bumper or a language, framework, or part of the technology stack we use to build Bumper, Have strong oral and written communication skills in English. Now a Bit About You… We are a passionate and professional team, and we’re excited to welcome a Senior Backend Engineer who shares our vision of making Bumper the leading automotive payment and insights platform! In this role, you’ll have the opportunity to work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment where data-driven decision-making is at the heart of everything we do . You’ll play a key role in designing scalable systems, improving our architecture, and collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to deliver robust backend solutions. If you thrive on solving complex technical challenges, enjoy working with modern technologies, and have a proactive mindset for building efficient systems , we’d love to hear from you! What You'll Get From Us... Competitive Salary Private Health Insurance We give 26 days holiday + bank holidays, plus volunteer days throughout the year (pro-rated) £250 annually wellbeing allowance £200 monthly meal allowance to enjoy delicious food while you work your magic £150 annually development allowance £25 monthly budget to spend at our amazing team events – fun guaranteed! Our Bumper Flex policy for better work/life balance (3 days in office) Annual company-wide Bumper Retreat—a few days of fun, collaboration, and mingling(make sure your passport’s in date!) Perks are nice, but we know perks don’t make up the whole package of a great job. By joining our Bumper team, you'll have the opportunity to be an ambassador for our product & brand, and help us to continue on our winning streak!

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Blueclip olarak, finans ve teknoloji kesişiminde faaliyet gösteren partnerimiz için bir Lead Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Partnerimiz, kıymetli madenler, döviz ve finansal teknolojiler alanında ürünler geliştiren güçlü sermaye yapısına sahip bir teknoloji şirketidir. Bu pozisyonda görev alacak kişi, şirketin yeni nesil finansal ürünlerinin teknik mimarisini oluşturacak, geliştirme süreçlerine liderlik edecek ve ürünlerin büyümesine paralel olarak kurulacak ekibin temelini oluşturacaktır. Rol Hakkında Sorumluluklar Finansal teknoloji ürünlerinin uçtan uca geliştirilmesi Backend ve frontend mimarisinin tasarlanması Stabil, güvenilir ve sürdürülebilir sistemlerin oluşturulması Teknik stack seçimleri ve mimari kararların alınması Mobil, web ve masaüstü uygulama geliştirme süreçlerine katkı sağlanması Ürünlerin canlı ortam operasyonlarının ve teknik kalitesinin yönetilmesi İlerleyen dönemde geliştirici ekibinin büyümesine destek olunması Geliştirilecek Ürünler Kurumsal Döviz Platformu Kurumsal müşterilerin uygulama üzerinden döviz işlemleri gerçekleştirebildiği finansal platform. Kuyumcular için Ön Muhasebe Platformu Kuyum sektörüne yönelik, yüksek veri doğruluğu ve operasyonel güvenilirlik gerektiren iş yönetim sistemi. Kıymetli Maden Operasyon Platformu Kıymetli maden ticaretine yönelik muhasebe ve operasyon yönetim ürünü. Aranan Nitelikler En az 3-5 yıl Full Stack Development deneyimi Finans, bankacılık, trading, sermaye piyasaları veya borsa sistemleri üzerinde çalışma deneyimi Modern web teknolojileri konusunda güçlü bilgi sahibi olmak Backend mimarileri ve veri modelleme konusunda deneyim sahibi olmak Ürün geliştirme süreçlerinde teknik kararlar alabilmek Kod kalitesi, veri güvenliği ve sistem stabilitesine önem vermek Teknik dokümantasyon ve İngilizce kaynakları takip edebilecek seviyede İngilizce bilgisi Aradığımız Profil İş sahipliği yüksek Çözüm odaklı Takım çalışmasına yatkın Teknik kaliteyi önceliklendiren Uzun vadeli ürün geliştirme vizyonuna sahip Çalışma Modeli Lokasyon: Mecidiyeköy Çalışma Şekli: Tam zamanlı Çalışma Saatleri: 09:00 – 18:00 Neden Bu Rol? Sıfırdan ürün geliştirme ve teknik mimariyi şekillendirme fırsatı Güçlü finansal destek ve uzun vadeli büyüme hedefi Karar alma süreçlerinde yüksek etki alanı Başarılı olması halinde kendi teknik ekibini kurma fırsatı Teknik geçmişe sahip ürün yöneticileriyle çalışma imkanı

title: Senior Backend Developer (Node.js / Nest.js)
description: About us: Talent has no borders. Proxify's mission is to connect top developers around the world with opportunities they deserve. So, it doesn't matter where you are; we are here to help you fast-track your independent career in the right direction. 🙂 Since our launch, Proxify's developers have successfully worked with 1200+ happy clients to build their products and growth features. 5000+ talented developers trust Proxify and its network to fulfill their dreams and objectives. Proxify is shaped by a global network of supportive, talented developers interested in remote full-time jobs. Our Glassdoor (4.5/5) and Trustpilot (4.8/5) ratings reflect the trust developers place in us and our commitment to our members' success. The Role: We are looking for a Senior Backend (Node.js / Nest.js) Developer to join our fast-growing network. You’ll be responsible for building modern and scalable web applications, working closely with backend developers and designers to create intuitive user experiences. This is a long-term, full-time remote role with opportunities to work on innovative projects that make a difference. What we’re looking for: 5+ years with Node.js and 3+ past years with Nest.js Strong expertise in Node.js and Nest.js frameworks. Proven experience building REST and/or GraphQL APIs. Strong knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+) and TypeScript. Solid experience with relational and/or NoSQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB). Familiarity with authentication/authorization mechanisms (JWT, OAuth2). Experience with unit/integration testing (e.g., Jest, Mocha). Proficiency with Git and version control workflows. Nice to Have: Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP). Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices. Understanding of event-driven architecture and message brokers (e.g., RabbitMQ, Kafka). Experience with Docker and containerized applications. Knowledge of microservices and serverless architectures. Responsibilities: Design and develop robust, scalable, and secure backend applications using Node.js and Nest.js. Implement RESTful APIs, GraphQL endpoints, and microservices architectures. Optimize application performance, scalability, and maintainability. Integrate with databases (SQL/NoSQL) and external services via APIs. Ensure code quality, security, and compliance with industry standards. What we offer: Get paid, not played No more unreliable clients. Enjoy on-time monthly payments with flexible withdrawal options. Predictable project hours Enjoy a harmonious work-life balance with consistent 8-hour working days with clients. Flex days, so you can recharge Enjoy up to 24 flex days off per year without losing pay, for full-time positions found through Proxify. Career-accelerating positions at cutting-edge companies Discover exclusive long-term remote positions at the world's most exciting companies. Hand-picked opportunities just for you Skip the typical recruitment roadblocks and biases with personally matched positions. One seamless process, multiple opportunities A one-time contracting process for endless opportunities, with no extra assessments. Compensation Enjoy the same pay, every month with positions landed through Proxify.

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: About Us GönderAL is a financial technology company focused on building secure and scalable digital payment platforms. We design systems that support real-time transactions, robust infrastructure, and user-friendly interfaces tailored for modern financial operations. We operate in a dynamic, collaborative environment focused on secure, reliable, and customer-centered financial services. For us, impact is the driver of our work. We value ownership, practical problem-solving, and teamwork to deliver meaningful solutions for our customers and partners. Responsibilities Design and develop high-scale backend systems using microservice architecture Build enterprise-grade APIs and services with the .NET (C#) ecosystem Embrace an AI-first development approach and actively use AI tools to improve engineering productivity and delivery quality Work effectively with both SQL (PostgreSQL, MSSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch) databases Apply Domain-Driven Design (DDD), CQRS, and Event Sourcing concepts in real-world projects where appropriate Lead code review processes, define technical standards, and drive their adoption across the team Identify performance bottlenecks and optimize them systematically Mentor junior and mid-level developers Create and maintain technical documentation Technical Requirements 5+ years of professional backend software development experience Hands-on experience building enterprise applications with .NET / C# (ASP.NET Core, .NET 6/7/8) Production experience with microservice architecture, including inter-service communication (gRPC, REST, message brokers) Strong understanding of SOLID principles and Clean Architecture Advanced query optimization and schema design experience with both SQL and NoSQL databases Experience with event-driven architecture using RabbitMQ, Kafka, or Azure Service Bus Experience working in containerized environments with Docker and Kubernetes Proficiency in Git-based version control and code review workflows Experience working in Agile teams following Scrum or Kanban Nice to Have Project experience with at least one AI framework such as LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, or Semantic Kernel Experience designing and deploying AI-powered workflows or autonomous agents Hands-on experience designing and implementing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines Experience with vector databases

title: Full Stack Mobile Developer / Co-Founder
description: Our partner company is looking for a skilled, experienced, visionary and entrepreneurial Full Stack Mobile Developer as a Co-Founder to own end-to-end all technical processes and development such as Mobile, Backend, Frontend, Web, PC, AI, Cloud, etc This is a Startup Co-Founder role. Compensation will only be based on Profit Share and Stock Option (Vesting). If you are excited to start your own business, this is the perfect opportunity for you! About us: Co-Founders having 15+ years of tech experience providing funds Requirements : 6+ years of experience in Development having 4+ years in Mobile development Graduated from relevant University departments Full Stack experience including React Native, Flutter, Python, Java etc and all required and related Tech Stack Proven track record of developing high income generating iOS, Android, AI apps Hands on experience with AI, API, SDK, Analytics, DB, Cloud, Web, Server, Tool processes, development and integrations Proven end-to-end ownership of all technical processes and development Rapid and high quality prototyping, iterations and liveops Deep expertise with readable, reusable, improvable development and coding Solid experience with Mobile performance: rendering, memory, battery, network usage minimization and optimization Strong understanding of Product, Design, UI/UX, A/B Testing, Marketing and Monetization processes Keeping up and ahead of current trends and industry Having great portfolio and references A creative and hacker mindset with a strong sense of ownership Using AI, AI apps and tools to get ahead of competition For male candidates, having completed military service or having a permanent exemption What We Offer: Being a Co-Founder Future CTO Remote / Hybrid Working Flexible Hours Profit Share Stock Option Great Team Funding

title: React Native Developer
description: 🚀 Projelerimiz İçin 4 Aylık Mid-Level React Native Developer Arıyoruz Artistik Dijital olarak, farklı sektörlerde geliştirdiğimiz mobil uygulama ve web tabanlı dijital ürün projelerinde bizimle çalışacak Mid-Level React Native Developer arıyoruz. Geliştirilecek mobil uygulamalar Vibe Coding (genellikle React Native + Expo framework) ile yazılacaktır. Bu nedenle React Native ve Expo tarafında aktif geliştirme deneyimi bizim için temel beklentidir. Bu pozisyonda; üyelik sistemleri, kullanıcı panelleri, admin panel yapıları, rezervasyon akışları, bildirim sistemleri, QR / PNR yapıları, harita kullanımı, chatbot entegrasyonları ve kullanıcı etkileşimi yüksek dijital deneyimler geliştirilecek. Önemli: Geliştireceğimiz uygulamaların büyük bölümü AI Studio ve benzeri AI temelli geliştirme araçları kullanılarak üretilecek. Bu nedenle yalnızca klasik yazılım geliştirme bilgisi değil; AI destekli geliştirme mantığını bilmek, bu araçlarla hızlı prototip çıkarabilmek ve ortaya çıkan yapıyı teknik olarak düzenleyip sürdürülebilir hale getirebilmek bizim için çok önemli. Aradığımız kişi; • React Native (özellikle Expo tabanlı geliştirme) ile mobil uygulama geliştirme konusunda deneyimli • iOS ve Android yayın süreçlerine hakim veya bu süreçlerde çalışmış • AI Studio, Cursor, Codex, Claude Code veya benzeri AI destekli geliştirme araçlarına hakim • AI araçlarıyla çıkan kodu anlayıp düzenleyebilecek, optimize edebilecek ve projeyi yayına hazır hale getirebilecek • Backend / API mantığını bilen, entegrasyon süreçlerinde çözüm üretebilen • Firebase, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Node.js, Next.js veya benzer teknolojilerle çalışmış • Admin panel, kullanıcı yönetimi ve rol-yetki sistemleri konusunda deneyimli • Rezervasyon, kapasite, slot, QR, PNR, bildirim ve kullanıcı akışı gibi yapılarda mantık kurabilecek • Harita, canlı konum, push notification ve üçüncü parti servis entegrasyonlarına aşina • UI/UX hassasiyeti olan, sadece çalışan değil kullanıcı dostu ürün geliştirmeye önem veren • Test yazma (unit test / integration test), regresyon kontrolü ve kalite süreçlerine hakim • Yüksek eşzamanlı trafik altında performans optimizasyonu yapabilen, stres testleri ve yük testleri konusunda bilinçli • Git akışı (branch yönetimi, code review süreçleri) ve CI/CD pipeline kurulum/işletim süreçlerine hakim • 4 ay boyunca düzenli, disiplinli ve proje sorumluluğu alarak çalışabilecek biri olmalı. Bu pozisyon yalnızca kod yazma rolü değil; ürün mantığını anlayan, AI destekli üretim sürecine adapte olabilen, gerektiğinde teknik karar alabilen ve projeleri hızlı şekilde MVP’den yayına taşıyabilecek bir ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. 📍 Çalışma modeli: Proje Bazlı ⏳ Süre: 4 Ay 💻 Seviye: Mid-Level 📱 Ana teknoloji: React Native + Expo 🤖 Öncelik: AI destekli geliştirme araçlarına hakimiyet 📩 Başvuru için CV, portfolyo veya daha önce geliştirdiğiniz projeleri DM üzerinden iletebilirsiniz. Pozisyon başlangıçta 4 aylık proje sürecini kapsamaktadır. Devam eden ve yeni başlayacak projelerin durumuna göre iş birliğinin uzatılması değerlendirilebilir.
